category_title: Students with communication difficulties and reactive behavioral outbursts when challenged
scenario_title: One-to-one informal conversation about a playground incident
minimal_context: The student is in a one-to-one setting trying to tell the teacher about an incident that happened in the playground.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You said you wanted to tell me about something that happened in the playground.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Yes, we were out there and... and then he came over and... and he just...

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: He took it and... wait, no... I mean... (Becomes flustered and loses track of the conversation)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't know! I can't say it! (Gets annoyed, becomes visibly upset, and refuses to continue the conversation)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: You said you wanted to tell me about something that happened in the playground.

STUDENT: Yes, we were out there and... and then he came over and... and he just...

TUTOR: What else?

STUDENT: He took it and... wait, no... I mean... (Becomes flustered and loses track of the conversation)

TUTOR: Just tell me what happened.

STUDENT: I don't know! I can't say it! (Gets annoyed, becomes visibly upset, and refuses to continue the conversation)

task.content: Trying to tell the teacher something that happened in the playground

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When he loses track of the conversation and struggles to express himself
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Gets annoyed or just does not continue the conversation

behavior_patterns.condition: When he is not coping with expressing himself
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: He is often violent as a consequence
